message:
fix(cli): canonicalize paths in protect/unprotect to prevent symlink traversal (bd-3ok)

Call path.canonicalize() in both run_protect and run_unprotect before
passing to create_marker/remove_marker. This resolves symlinks and
relative path components (../) so marker files are always placed at
the true filesystem location, not a symlink alias.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
